incidentSummary: Inventory consumer repeatedly failed processing a malformed order-created event and eventually routed it to DLQ.

rootCauseHypotheses.cause: semantic validation failure (non-positive amount) created poison message
rootCauseHypotheses.reasoningSummary: Consumer logs show repeat validation exceptions for the same message key and DLQ publish event confirms quarantine after retries.

performanceFindings: Retry activity increased consumer processing cost for the affected partition.
recommendedActions: Add producer-side schema/semantic validation to prevent invalid amount values.
Keep DLQ monitoring and include payload fingerprint to speed triage.
